scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟡 yellow · Secondary: 🟣 lavender · Accent: 🩷 coral
scenes.desc: Εξώφυλλο: Η Μελίνα καθισμένη στο χαλί του δωματίου της, αγκαλιά με τον Μπισκότο, γύρω τους ανοιχτά βιβλία και μολύβια, ζεστό απογευματινό φως.
scenes.prompt: Book cover illustration. Melina sitting cross-legged on a rug in her bedroom, hugging Biscuit the puppy, surrounded by open picture books and colored pencils, warm afternoon light through a window, cozy bedroom with a bookshelf and a small plant, joyful and safe atmosphere.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina and Biscuit centered in the lower two-thirds; leave open sky/wall space in the upper third for title text overlay.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟡 yellow · Secondary: 🩷 coral · Accent: 🟢 sage
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα χοροπηδά με ανοιχτά χέρια μπροστά από έναν ψηλό πύργο τουβλάκια, ο Μπισκότο πηδά χαρούμενος δίπλα της, ζεστό ηλιόλουστο δωμάτιο.
scenes.prompt: Melina jumping joyfully with arms wide open in front of a tall block tower she just built, Biscuit the puppy jumping happily beside her with tongue out, sunny living room, warm golden light, sense of triumphant celebration.
scenes.safe: Keep the tower and both characters within the central safe area; avoid cropping Melina's raised arms at the frame edge.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🔵 soft blue · Secondary: 🟣 lavender · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα κάθεται στο πάτωμα με σκυμμένο κεφάλι, κρατώντας ένα σκισμένο ζωγραφισμένο χαρτί με ουράνιο τόξο, ο Μπισκότο ακουμπά το κεφάλι του στο γόνατό της με ένοχο βλέμμα.
scenes.prompt: Melina sitting on the floor with her head down, holding a torn hand-drawn rainbow picture in both hands, small tears, Biscuit the puppy resting his head gently on her knee with a guilty, apologetic expression, soft muted afternoon light, tender and quiet mood.
scenes.safe: Keep the torn paper visible and readable as a rainbow drawing; keep both faces unobscured within central frame.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🔵 soft blue · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα, η μαμά και ο Μπισκότο αγκαλιασμένοι στο πάτωμα δίπλα στα δύο κομμάτια του σκισμένου σχεδίου, ζεστό φως.
scenes.prompt: Melina, her mom, and Biscuit the puppy sitting together on the floor in a gentle group hug, the two torn pieces of the rainbow drawing resting nearby, warm soft lamp light, calm and comforting mood, mom's ponytail and lavender cardigan visible.
scenes.safe: Keep the hug group centered; leave breathing room above heads for the page's question text that sits directly above this image.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🔴 coral-red · Secondary: 🟡 yellow · Accent: 🟢 sage
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα στέκεται με σφιγμένες γροθιές και κόκκινα μάγουλα, μπροστά της ο Νίκος κρατά το αρκουδάκι της, ο Μπισκότο κοιτά ανήσυχος.
scenes.prompt: Melina standing with clenched fists and flushed red cheeks, an angry but not scary expression, facing Nikos (energetic 6-year-old boy) who holds her teddy bear, Biscuit the puppy watching anxiously from the side, living room setting, tense but safe family moment.
scenes.safe: Keep both children's faces and the teddy bear clearly visible within the central frame.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟢 sage · Secondary: 🟣 lavender · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα και ο Μπισκότο παίζουν επιτραπέζιο πάνω σε ένα χαλί, ζάρι στη μέση, χαμογελαστοί.
scenes.prompt: Top-down view of Melina and Biscuit the puppy playing a small board game on a living room rug, a die in the middle, both smiling, warm cozy afternoon light.
scenes.safe: Keep the board game board and both characters within frame, slight vignette at edges is fine.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🔵 soft blue · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα στέκεται στην άκρη της πισίνας, κρατώντας σφιχτά το χέρι του μπαμπά, κοιτάζοντας διστακτικά το νερό, δίπλα της τυλιγμένο σε πετσέτα το κουνελάκι Καρότο.
scenes.prompt: Melina standing at the edge of a swimming pool, gripping her dad's hand tightly, looking hesitantly at the blue water, a plush bunny (Carrot) wrapped in a towel beside her on a pool chair, dad kneeling beside her with glasses and a plaid shirt, bright outdoor pool setting, nervous but supported mood.
scenes.safe: Keep the pool edge line roughly at the lower third; keep Melina and dad's joined hands unobscured in the center.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟠 orange · Secondary: 🩷 coral · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα με ορθάνοιχτα μάτια και ανοιχτό στόμα, μπροστά της φίλοι κρατούν μια τούρτα με κεράκια, ο Μπισκότο φοράει στραβό καπελάκι πάρτι.
scenes.prompt: Melina with wide-open eyes and an open-mouth surprised expression, facing a small group of friends (a curly-red-haired girl, an energetic boy, a quiet boy) holding up a birthday cake with lit candles, Biscuit the puppy wearing a crooked party hat, colorful balloons in the background, joyful surprise-party mood.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina's surprised face and the cake both within frame; balloons can bleed off the top edge.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟢 sage · Secondary: 🟣 lavender · Accent: 🟡 yellow (lamp glow)
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα καθισμένη στο κρεβάτι της με μια κουβέρτα, διαβάζει ένα βιβλίο, ο Μπισκότο κοιμάται κουλουριασμένος δίπλα της, απαλό φως βραδινού.
scenes.prompt: Melina sitting on her bed wrapped in a soft blanket, reading a picture book, Biscuit the puppy curled up asleep beside her, warm dim evening lamp light, peaceful bedtime mood, cozy bedroom with a small nightlight.
scenes.safe: Keep the bed and both characters centered; soft vignette toward edges is fine for this calm scene.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟡 yellow · Secondary: 🟢 sage · Accent: 🩷 coral
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα και ο Μπισκότο τρέχουν χαρούμενοι προς την τσουλήθρα, ζωντανή παιδική χαρά με πολλά παιδιά στο βάθος, ζεστά χρώματα.
scenes.prompt: Melina and Biscuit the puppy running happily toward a slide in a lively, colorful playground, several children playing in the background on swings and a roundabout, bright sunny day, cheerful and energetic mood.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina and Biscuit in sharp focus in the foreground center-left; background children can be looser/smaller.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🔵 soft blue · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα στέκεται πιο σιωπηλή ανάμεσα σε παιδιά που παίζουν, κοιτάζει γύρω της, ο Μπισκότο δίπλα της με στοργικό βλέμμα.
scenes.prompt: Melina standing very still and quiet among other children playing energetically around her, slightly overwhelmed expression, looking around, Biscuit the puppy pressed gently against her leg looking up with a caring expression, busy playground background slightly blurred to suggest sensory overload, empathetic mood.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina's face clearly readable in the center; background children can be softly blurred toward the edges.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🟢 sage · Accent: 🩷 coral
scenes.desc: Μικρή εικόνα της περιστρεφόμενης πλατφόρμας στη μία άκρη και του ήσυχου παγκακιού στην άλλη, σαν αρχή και τέλος διαδρομής.
scenes.prompt: Simple split illustration: a spinning playground roundabout on one side fading into a quiet park bench under a tree on the other side, small path connecting them, symbolic before/after composition, soft colors.
scenes.safe: Keep both landmarks recognizable and roughly equal in visual weight left/right.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🔴 coral-red · Secondary: 🔵 soft blue · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα μπροστά στην τηλεόραση, με σφιγμένες γροθιές και κόκκινα μάγουλα, η μαμά γονατισμένη δίπλα της με ήρεμο βλέμμα.
scenes.prompt: Melina standing in front of a TV with clenched fists and a flushed, frustrated expression, mom kneeling beside her at eye level with a calm, understanding expression, cozy living room in the evening, warm lamp light, emotionally tense but safe family moment.
scenes.safe: Keep both faces at eye-level within the central band of the frame; TV can be softly out of focus in the background.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🔵 soft blue · Secondary: 🟢 sage · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα κάθεται μόνη σε ένα σκαλοπάτι της αυλής του σχολείου, παρακολουθώντας από μακριά δύο συμμαθήτριές της να παίζουν.
scenes.prompt: Melina sitting alone on a school-yard step, head slightly bowed, watching two classmates play together in the distance, schoolyard with trees and a playground in the background, wistful and quietly sad mood, soft daylight.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina in the foreground lower-third; the playing classmates should read as small and distant in the background.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🟡 yellow · Accent: 🩷 coral
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα στέκεται στην πόρτα μιας αίθουσας χορού, κρύβοντας το πρόσωπό της στο πλάι του μπαμπά, βλέποντας από μακριά άλλα παιδιά με ρούχα χορού.
scenes.prompt: Melina standing at the doorway of a dance studio, partially hiding her face against her dad's side, peeking shyly at other children in dance outfits inside the room, dad kneeling with a reassuring hand on her shoulder, bright studio interior with a wall of mirrors, nervous-but-supported mood.
scenes.safe: Keep the doorway framing centered; Melina and dad should occupy the foreground, dance studio visible but softly behind them.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟡 yellow · Secondary: 🔴 coral-red · Accent: 🟢 sage
scenes.desc: Επιτραπέζιο παιχνίδι στο τραπέζι, ο Νίκος πανηγυρίζει επειδή έφτασε πρώτος στο τέρμα, η Μελίνα κοιτάζει τα πιόνια με απογοήτευση.
scenes.prompt: A board game laid out on a table, Nikos cheering with raised arms because his piece reached the finish first, Melina looking at the game pieces with a disappointed pout, dad sitting across the table with a calm supportive expression, cozy living room, bittersweet family game-night mood.
scenes.safe: Keep the game board and all three characters within frame; board details can be simplified/soft-focus.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟢 sage · Secondary: 🟡 yellow · Accent: 🩷 coral
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα, ο Νίκος και ο μπαμπάς γύρω από ένα επιτραπέζιο παιχνίδι, χαμογελαστοί, ζάρι στον αέρα.
scenes.prompt: Melina, Nikos and dad sitting around a board game, all smiling, a die caught mid-air as if just thrown, playful family moment, warm living room light.
scenes.safe: Keep all three faces visible; die can be slightly motion-blurred mid-air.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟢 sage · Secondary: 🟡 yellow · Accent: 🩷 coral
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα στέκεται δίπλα στις κούνιες της παιδικής χαράς, περιμένοντας τη σειρά της, κοιτάζοντας τα λουλούδια στο γρασίδι.
scenes.prompt: Melina standing beside a row of playground swings, waiting her turn with a slightly impatient but curious expression, looking down at colorful flowers in the grass, another child swinging in the background, sunny playground setting, patient waiting mood.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina and the flowers in the lower half of the frame; swings and waiting child can occupy the upper half.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟡 yellow · Secondary: 🔵 soft blue · Accent: 🟣 lavender
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα στέκεται μπροστά σε ένα παιδί που παίζει μόνο του με μπάλα, με ερωτηματικό βλέμμα· η μαμά κάπως πιο πίσω παρακολουθεί με στοργή.
scenes.prompt: Melina standing in front of another child who is playing alone with a ball and has just said no to playing together, Melina has a puzzled, slightly hurt expression, mom standing a little further back watching with a warm supportive expression, sunny playground, gentle bittersweet mood.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina's questioning expression and the other child's ball both visible in the central frame.

scenes.camera: Wide shot, three-quarter, sense of motion
scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟡 yellow · Secondary: 🟢 sage · Accent: 🔵 soft blue
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα πάνω στο ποδήλατό της χωρίς βοηθητικές ρόδες, ο μπαμπάς κρατά ελαφρά τη σέλα, και τα δύο χαμογελαστά αλλά συγκεντρωμένα.
scenes.prompt: Melina riding a bicycle without training wheels, dad lightly holding the back of the seat while jogging alongside, both with focused, determined smiles, a sunny neighborhood street with trees, encouraging and hopeful mood, sense of motion.
scenes.safe: Keep the bicycle and both characters in the lower two-thirds; street/trees can extend into the upper third.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🩷 coral · Accent: 🟡 yellow (warm light)
scenes.desc: Η μαμά φοράει το παλτό της δίπλα στην πόρτα, γονατισμένη στο ύψος της Μελίνας, κρατώντας της ένα μικρό κασκόλ· ο παππούς περιμένει χαμογελαστός από πίσω.
scenes.prompt: Mom kneeling at Melina's eye level by the front door, wearing her coat, handing Melina a small scarf to hold, grandpa (white moustache, hat, plaid vest) waiting warmly in the background, entryway of a cozy home, tender goodbye mood, soft evening light.
scenes.safe: Keep mom and Melina's eye-level exchange centered; grandpa can be softly positioned in the background.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🩷 coral · Secondary: 🟡 yellow · Accent: 🟣 lavender
scenes.desc: Πάρτι γενεθλίων, πολλά παιδιά τραγουδούν δυνατά γύρω από τούρτα με κεράκια, μπαλόνια, η Μελίνα καλύπτει ελαφρά τα αυτιά της.
scenes.prompt: A lively birthday party scene with several children singing loudly around a cake with candles, balloons and streamers, Melina standing slightly apart with her hands gently covering her ears, a slightly overwhelmed expression, grandma visible nearby noticing her, warm indoor party lighting.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina's covered-ears gesture clearly visible in the foreground; the singing group can be busy/dense in the background.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟢 sage · Secondary: 🟡 yellow · Accent: 🩷 coral
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα μόλις μπήκε σπίτι με τη σχολική της τσάντα, ο μπαμπάς κρατά ένα παιχνίδι έτοιμος να παίξουν, εκείνη δείχνει απαλά την ήρεμη γωνιά της.
scenes.prompt: Melina just walking in the front door still wearing her school backpack, dad standing nearby holding a board game eagerly, Melina gently pointing toward her cozy reading corner across the room, warm entryway lighting, understanding and patient family mood.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina and dad in the foreground; the calm corner she's pointing to can be softly visible in the background.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟡 yellow · Secondary: 🟢 sage · Accent: 🟣 lavender
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα προσπαθεί να δέσει μόνη της τα κορδόνια της, με μπερδεμένο βλέμμα, ο Μπισκότο κοιτάζει από δίπλα.
scenes.prompt: Melina sitting on the floor trying to tie her own shoelaces, a puzzled and slightly frustrated expression, tangled laces, Biscuit the puppy sitting beside her watching curiously, cozy hallway setting, determined problem-solving mood.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina's hands and the shoelaces clearly visible and readable in the central frame.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🟡 yellow · Accent: 🟢 sage
scenes.desc: Η Μελίνα κάθεται στην ήρεμη γωνιά της με τον Μπισκότο, γύρω τους μικρές φανταστικές φυσαλίδες με όλα τα συναισθήματα του βιβλίου.
scenes.prompt: Melina sitting contentedly in her cozy calm corner with Biscuit the puppy curled beside her, surrounded by small whimsical floating bubble-shapes each containing a different simple emoji-like face (happy, sad, angry, scared, surprised, calm), warm evening light, reflective and proud mood, sense of a completed journey.
scenes.safe: Keep Melina and Biscuit centered; the floating emotion bubbles can be arranged loosely around the upper frame.

scenes.palette: Dominant: 🟣 lavender · Secondary: 🩷 coral · Accent: 🟡 yellow
scenes.desc: Όλη η οικογένεια γύρω από το μεγάλο επιτραπέζιο, γιορτινή ατμόσφαιρα, μικρές φυσαλίδες συναισθημάτων στον αέρα.
scenes.prompt: The whole family (Melina, mom, dad) and Biscuit the puppy gathered around the large final board game, festive celebratory atmosphere, tiny floating emotion-face bubbles in the air, warm family-game-night lighting.
scenes.safe: Keep all family members within frame; bubbles can float off the top edge.

base_style: warm children's picture-book illustration in a simple FLAT storybook style (NOT semi-realistic, NOT glossy editorial illustration, NOT detailed digital painting, NOT textured/grainy illustration, NO paper or canvas grain texture) — soft rounded shapes, thick clean uniform linework in deep indigo (#2E2A47, NOT black), flat single-tone gouache/watercolor color fills with minimal to no shading (no fabric folds, no directional gradients), big expressive eyes, pastel palette (lavender #7B6FC4, coral #E85D42, sunny yellow #F4B93C, sage green #5AA588, soft blue #4E85B8), simple toddler-book proportions, warm soft flat lighting, no photorealism, no anime style, no semi-realistic rendering, no gradient shading, no jewelry, no detailed fabric texture
consistency:
Maintain exact character consistency across every illustration: same face, hairstyle, proportions and clothing for every recurring character throughout the entire book.
Melina = 5.5-year-old girl, brown bob haircut with soft front fringe, pink bow on the side, big brown eyes, light freckles across the nose, denim overall dungarees over a yellow-and-white striped shirt, pink sneakers.
Biscuit = small cream/white fluffy puppy, floppy brown ears, blue collar.
Mom = brown hair in a ponytail, soft lavender cardigan.
Dad = short curly hair, glasses, plaid shirt.
Grandma = silver hair in a bun, floral-print apron.
Grandpa = white moustache, brimmed hat, plaid vest.
Sofia = curly red hair, girl, same age as Melina.
Nikos = energetic boy, about 6 years old.
Leonidas = quiet boy, about 5 years old, neighbor.
negative: photorealism, semi-realistic rendering, glossy/detailed digital painting, paper grain, canvas texture, crayon texture, anime/manga style, scary or dark imagery, text or letters in image, extra limbs or distorted hands/faces, exaggerated adult body proportions, jewelry, detailed fabric texture, fabric folds, heavy gradient shading, blurry, logos or watermarks, violence, clinical or medical imagery
